location: Random drop from Exile Soldier courtyard guards in Stormveil Castle — farmable near Liftside Chamber grace (descend into the stockade courtyard to the south) or from a soldier near Stormveil Cliffside grace, up the wooden stairs along the wall.
tactics: The Liftside Chamber courtyard has two guards carrying the Torchpole close together, making it the more efficient of the two farm spots
As a lit torch on a pole it doubles as a light source in dark areas, but it can't be held overhead, so it won't illuminate anything above head height
Drop rate is roughly 2%, so budget for repeated kills and grace resets
Don't confuse it with the plain Spear or Pike also dropped in Stormveil — the Torchpole is the one dealing fire damage
lore: Simply a torch lashed to a long pole, once carried by watchmen to light dark corners — in a fight, the flame doubles as a weapon that burns as it stabs.

builds.name: Fire zoning poke
builds.why: Even D/D Strength-Dexterity scaling plus innate fire damage make it useful against fire-weak early enemies and for keeping distance while burning through poise
